title: Integrations Engineer, Agentic AI Platform
description:
Job Title: Integrations Engineer, Agentic AI Platform

Preferred Location(s):

- Chennai, India

The Team: AECO Segment, Agentic AI Platform Integrations
Team

Reports to: Tyler Miller, VP, Agentic AI

At Trimble, we are enabling our customers by leveraging
cutting-edge artificial intelligence. We believe that
intelligent agents will fundamentally transform how
businesses operate. We are building a foundational Agentic
AI Platform to power these next-generation applications, and
we're looking for a passionate, experienced Integrations
Engineer to lead the way.

What you will do

As an Integrations Engineer on the Agentic AI Platform
Integrations team, you will act as a crucial bridge between
our engineering teams and our customers (internal teams,
partners and customers). Your primary focus will be to help
customers understand and leverage our Agentic AI Platform to
solve their specific business problems. This role requires a
unique blend of technical expertise, problem-solving skills,
and exceptional communication. You will work directly with
our clients to understand their technical requirements,
design tailored solutions, and ensure a seamless integration
of our platform to serve their unique use cases.

Agentic AI Education & Customer-Facing Support:

- Serve as a technical subject matter expert on the Agentic AI
  Platform for our customers and partners.
- Educate clients on Agentic AI concepts, terminology, and
  use-case possibilities.
- Provide expert technical guidance and support to customers
  throughout the entire integration lifecycle, from pre to
  post-integration.
- Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues related to
  customer integrations and platform usage.

Technical Solutions & Implementation:

- Design and implement custom technical solutions by tailoring
  the Agentic AI Platform to meet customer-specific needs.
- Develop scripts, tools, and documentation to facilitate and
  streamline the integration process.
- Collaborate with clients' technical teams to ensure
  successful deployment and adoption of the platform.
- Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation,
  guides, and best practices for integration.

Collaboration & Product Improvement:

- Act as a key liaison between customers and our core
  engineering teams.
- Translate customer feedback and technical challenges into
  clear, actionable requirements for platform improvements
  and new features.
- Work closely with product managers, engineers, and
  researchers to inform the product roadmap based on real-
  world customer needs.
- Participate actively in team meetings and knowledge sharing.

What You Should Bring

- Bachelor's degree (or equivalent practical experience) in
  Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
- 3+ years of professional experience in a customer-facing
  technical role such as Solutions Engineer, Integrations
  Engineer, or Technical Consultant.
- Strong proficiency in at least one modern programming
  language (e.g., Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java).
- Solid understanding of software systems, APIs (REST, gRPC),
  and data formats (JSON, Protobuf).
- Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to debug
  complex technical issues.
- Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the
  ability to explain complex technical concepts to both
  technical and non-technical audiences.
- A strong desire to help customers succeed and a passion for
  working directly with clients.

Preferred Qualifications

- Hands-on experience with AI/ML concepts, particularly
  working with Large Language Models (LLMs) and vector
  databases.
- Practical experience with agentic AI concepts and frameworks
  (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex).
- Experience in developing and maintaining technical
  documentation for a developer audience.
- Familiarity with support/bug ticketing systems (e.g., Jira).
- Experience working in a fast-paced, startup-like
  environment.

About the Agentic AI Platform Team

The Agentic AI Platform Team is a new team. This role will
have significant influence on the technical strategy and
implementation. The team is currently reporting through
Trimble’s AECO segment, though we fully expect the Agentic
AI Platform services will be leveraged to build AI-powered
products across Trimble Construction (AECO + FS).

Trimble’s Inclusiveness Commitment

We believe in celebrating our differences. That is why our
diversity is our strength. To us, that means actively
participating in opportunities to be inclusive. Diversity,
Equity, and Inclusion have guided our current success while
also moving our desire to improve. We actively seek to add
members to our community who represent our customers and the
places we live and work. We have programs in place to make
sure our people are seen, heard, and welcomed and most
importantly that they know they belong, no matter who they
are or where they are coming from.

Trimble’s Privacy Policy

How to Apply: Please submit an online application for this
position by clicking on the ‘Apply Now’ button located in
this posting.

Application Deadline: Applications could be accepted until
at least 30 days from the posting date.

Join a Values-Driven Team: Belong, Grow, Innovate.

At Trimble, our core values of Belong, Grow, and Innovate
aren't just words—they're the foundation of our culture. We
foster an environment where you are seen, heard, and valued
(Belong); where you have an opportunity to build a career
and drive our collective growth (Grow); and where your
innovative ideas shape the future (Innovate). We believe in
empowering local teams to create impactful strategies,
ensuring our global vision resonates with every individual.
Become part of a team where your contributions truly matter.

Trimble’s Privacy Policy

If you need assistance or would like to request an
accommodation in connection with the application process,
please contact AskPX@px.trimble.com.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an Integrations Engineer role focused on helping
customers understand and deploy an existing Agentic AI
Platform. The responsibilities center on customer education,
technical support, integration implementation, and
translating customer feedback to engineering teams - not on
building, training, or fine-tuning AI models themselves.
